qualifications.name: BEd Degree in Foundation Phase Teaching - Foundation Phase Teaching Grade R-3
notes: Qualification code: B5BFPQ.
Qualification group: BEd Degree in Foundation Phase Teaching.
Campus: SWC.
Career paths: Educator focusing on primary school teaching.

Faculty notes: Due to limited space, fulfilling all minimum admission requirements does not guarantee acceptance into a programme; A valid National Senior Certificate with admission for degree purposes is required; Minimum APS is 28, excluding Life Orientation; A Bachelor's degree endorsement does not guarantee admission to the BEd; Preliminary admission is based on final Grade 11 results; Final admission is based on final Grade 12 results.

NCV admission summary: NCV Level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training; Three fundamental subjects between 60-69%, including English as language of learning and teaching; Three vocational subjects from the designated list between 70-79%.

one_of.subject: English Home Language or English First Additional Language
English Home Language or English First Additional Language
